enrichment.why_this_matters: Teclistamab plus daratumumab significantly improved progression-free survival in relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma, offering a new, highly effective treatment option for these patients.

This de novo guideline introduces new clinical categories for acute pulmonary embolism, enhancing precision in severity classification, prognosis, and evidence-based therapeutic decision-making. It will significantly impact clinical practice.

This is the first-in-human phase I/II trial of a tetravalent Klebsiella pneumoniae bioconjugate vaccine, showing it is well-tolerated and immunogenic in healthy adults. This is a crucial step towards preventing K. pneumoniae infections.
